prediction.reasoning: Based on historical AAPL volatility of approximately 25-30% annualized, I estimated a 21-day standard deviation of around 3.8%. The point estimate assumes modest upward drift consistent with long-term equity returns. Confidence intervals are constructed assuming log-normal price distribution with wider ranges reflecting the inherent uncertainty in short-term stock price movements.
